name: Chapin Modern Rattan Counter Height Barstool with Metal Legs Beige - Threshold™: Square Seat, Sled Base
description:
Perfect for pulling up to your kitchen island or home bar, this New Chapin Counter-Height Bar Stool from Threshold™ comes with an adjustable height. Built on a black metal frame, this bar stool features a square, armless silhouette with a rattan-like seat and backrest featuring a breezy woven design. The natural light brown hue lets it complement a range of decor styles, while the sled legs and sleek foot rails keep it standing properly poised in style.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
